final_prompt.prompt:
Create a macro photography shot of a water droplet reflection surrounded by grass blades and dew, suitable for a phone wallpaper.

Style/medium: needs a macro photography aesthetic — exact lens and focus technique is yours
Composition: must be extreme close-up of a single water droplet as focal point, with surrounding grass blades and smaller dew drops framing it
Subject: must include the water droplet with reflection inside it, grass blades, and surrounding dew drops
Scene/backdrop: must include natural grass environment with circular bokeh light spots in background
Lighting/mood: needs a delicate and magical natural atmosphere — exact light quality and time of day is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh natural direction — exact color balance is yours
Materials/textures: needs a delicate surface treatment — exact water surface tension detail and grass texture is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve circular bokeh background effect, must be suitable for phone wallpaper aspect ratio
Avoid:
